title: gymnanthemum urticifolium
intro: Gymnanthemum urticifolium, also known as false nettle, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits of this plant include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other conditions related to inflammation, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Herbal preparations of Gymnanthemum urticifolium can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
